news-global-econ.title: Nolte: Success of ‘Young Washington’ Launches Potential Franchise, Starting with ‘1776’
news-global-econ.description:
"Young Washington" grossed $7.65 million in just 2,700 theaters on America’s 250th birthday, beating "Toy Story 5."

news-global-econ.description:
The "supreme leader" of Iran, Mojtaba Khamenei, was notably absent from funeral events for his father and predecessor Ali Khamenei this weekend – an absence emphasized by the presence of three of his brothers.

news-global-econ.title: Sources corroborate whistleblower claims of corruption, quid pro quo culture inside powerful NYC union
news-global-econ.description: A whistleblower letter alleges Richard Maroko and New York Hotel Trades Council leaders accepted gifts from hotel executives in quid pro quo dealings.

news-global-econ.title: Starship delivery robots leave campuses for cities
news-global-econ.description: Starship Technologies is redeploying 1,200 delivery robots from U.S. college campuses to grocery delivery, but crowded city sidewalks pose new challenges.

news-global-soc.title: Fake Booking.com travel credit scam targets travelers
news-global-soc.description: A fake Booking.com phishing email offers a $500 travel credit using your real name, a tight deadline and a dangerous "Redeem Now" button to steal logins.
